projects.title: Asthma Watch
projects.description: An interactive dashboard to visualize the concentrations of different pollens and pollutants, as well as the rates of emergency department visits for asthma in France. The dashboard is automatically updated through a data pipeline integrating web scraping, storage, and interactive display.

projects.title: Weather ETL
projects.description: Fully automated end-to-end data pipeline that collects daily weather data using the OpenWeatherMap API. The pipeline is orchestrated with Apache Airflow, which triggers a Python ETL job every day, fetching the data then loading the results into a PostgreSQL database. The entire infrastructure runs locally via Docker Compose. Data is visualized through an interactive Metabase dashboard that refreshes automatically as new data comes in
